wp_die ('Sorry, you are not allowed to do that.', 423)

preg_replace ("/\[\[AI_AI([\d]+?)\]\]/", "<section data-ai-position='" .AI_AUTOMATIC_INSERTION_AFTER_IMAGE ."' class='$class ai-images'>" . ($ai_wp_data [AI_MBSTRING_LOADED] ? mb_strtoupper (AI_TEXT_AFTER_IMAGE) : strtoupper (AI_TEXT_AFTER_IMAGE)) . " $1</section>", $content)
wp_die (__('You do not have sufficient permissions to access this page.'))

wp_remote_post (
        esc_url ($this->tracking_url . '?' . self::DST_TRACKING_URL_PARAMETER . '=' . $this->slug),
        array (
          'method'      => 'POST',
          'timeout'     => 20,
          'redirection' => 5,
          'httpversion' => '1.1',
          'blocking'    => false,
          'body'        => $data,
          'user-agent'  => 'PUT/1.0.0; ' . home_url ()
        )
      )
preg_replace ('#<title>([^<]*)</title>#', '<title>' . AD_INSERTER_NAME . ' ' . __('Ad Blocking Detected Message Preview', 'ad-inserter') . '</title>', $head)

sanitizers.expression:
$wpdb->prepare(
        "SELECT ID FROM {$wpdb->posts}
         WHERE post_status IN ('publish', 'pending', 'draft', 'auto-draft', 'future', 'private')
         AND post_content LIKE %s
         AND post_type IN ($placeholders)",
        ...$args
      )
